channel.title: Work on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Work on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Doom emacs
item.description:
emacs Link to heading

Basic Link to heading

  • windows manager

    • SPC w v: windows vertical split
    • SPC w s: windows split
    • SPC w hjkl: windows jumped to left/down/up/right.
    • SPC w HJKL: windows move.
    • SPC w b: windows jumped to bottom right.
    • SPC w t: windows jumped to top left.
    • SPC w w: windows jumped to next.
    • SPC w W: windows jumped to previous.
    • SPC w c: windows closed.
    • SPC w x: windows exchange.
    • SPC w +-<>: windwos change size.
    • SPC w =: windows balance.
    • SPC w m m: windows maximize the current windows.
    • SPC w u: undo the windows.

    Practice.

item.title: Career
item.description:
职业的演变 Link to heading

流水线的出现是现代岗位快速演变的关键。过去生产一个商品的绝大多数的工作都是由一个人完成的，但是当生产的量不断增加，单人的效率不够高，于是就出现了分工。实际上分工就是资本为了提高效率，提升利润自然想出的方法。 可以说随着生产量的增加，岗位会不断细分，岗位的数量可以说是无穷无尽的。而本质上岗位是依靠于商品的种类的。 商品的种类又取决于人类的需求，人类早期的需求从衣食住行到现在的教育医疗，到各种娱乐，人类不断满足自己的要求同时也在不断产生新的需求。 岗位服务于商品，对于商品到服务包括生产、运输和销售。当今的商品交易量不断增大，后两个环节的重要性不断凸显。

行业划分说明 Link to heading

商品从形态上分，大体可以分为两种——商品和服务。 行业和需求的种类息息相关。 本质上就分为两类：制造业；服务业

市面上有哪些工作 Link to heading

当某个职业需要的从业人数足够多，才会出现相应的职业培训（大学的专业往往是滞后、与市场实际需要不匹配的）。

通用岗位 Link to heading

  1. 管理岗
    • 有管理权的管理。负责部门工作安排和沟通，比如经理、主管之类的。通常是一层层晋升的。
    • 无管理权。负责统筹项目，非常考验为人处世。通常叫做项目经理或者产品经理。产品经理往往同时担任市场调研和产品设计，而项目经理只负责项目进度和各方协调。
  2. 管理、分析岗（一般出现于大公司）
    • 秘书、助理：干杂活，比如组织开会、整理资料、会议纪要和传话。在有些公司里面会帮领导承担部分管理职责，起草文件、代替领导开会、负责某个项目的落地。常见于央国企和大集团。
    • 财务、商业、战略、数据分析等分析岗位：就是负责不同领域的分析工作。财务分析，商业模式、收入盈利方面的分析、自身企业的发展规划和战略投资、对自身各业务经营状况的分析。
    • 资产管理：使用红次的盈利去投资增值。
  3. 销售岗
    • 业务员：面向公司机构的销售。跑业务，拜访客户，去外地。
    • 大客户销售、大客户经理：专门负责大公司客户（一般是集团类公司）的销售，因为这种公司，决策流程长，时间长，单价高，在本公司收入占比大，需要专人或者团队跟进。 比如搜索公司每年面对投入大量广告费的企业，高铁制造企业面对铁路运营企业
    • 客户经理：给客户推荐存款、理财、投资和贷款产品的，其他投资顾问和理财顾问都是这一类。
    • 商务：负责和商业相关的各种业务。常见于：
      1. 市场部，负责营销渠道开拓，比如线下销售的消费品牌开拓商超、手游公司开拓游戏上架的应用商店。
      2. 设计、工程、广告营销公司招标的时候负责的标书制作、投标。
      3. 物业公司负责招租、广告位、广告牌招商的。
      4. 自媒体行业、综艺电视剧拉广告赞助的。
      5. 一些行业中负责采购、招标的也会被称作商务。
    • 运营：销售产品、平台。 比如负责产品的拉新留存转化的增长、活动运营，电商的商品上下架、商品描述、设置促销活动的电商运营等等。
    • 销售、店员：销售产品 不同行业椰油不同名称。旅游行业的旅游规划师；留学考研咨询师；心理咨询师；教培行业的课程顾问、班主任；金融行业的理财顾问、规划师。
  4. 中介

中介本质上也是销售，售卖不同渠道的商品。 有的规模大形成了公司，甚至行业，比如房产中介、留学中介、红娘、兼职平台等。还有猎头、艺人经纪人、达人中介、精品投行等。 有的属于个人，比如医托、保险代理人、星探、帮影视介绍取景地的、帮小孩子报好学校的。

item.title: English Word
item.description:
daily words [2025-02-22 Sat] Link to heading

a slim volume of verse UK is the abbreviation of the United Kingdom. everyone have to abide by the law I really appreciate his complete absorption in his work. The proposal boarders on the absurd. His words are in accord with his ideas. We should first try to acquaint ourselves with the facts. We should adhere our opinions. He had no warrant forhis suspicion. His house is adjacent to mine. We heard laughter in the adjoining room. He is responsible for the administration of justice. We can advertise on the Internet. He showed me some aerial photographs. I affirm that what he said is true. Her blush witnessed her agitation. We spent a most agreeable day together. Alas! The church should have no political alignment. The approaching Allied forces.

item.title: Dual Ubuntu with win11
item.description:
This is the dual ubuntu set up progress1 Link to heading

refer to Dual Ubuntu 22.04

Version info Link to heading

This is the turtual about how to dual ubuntu with windows 11 on different harewares. version information: windows 11 24H2 Ubuntu 22.04 LTS

Preparation Link to heading

  • a 8 GB usb at least
  • a new SSD

Automatically Mount other disks Link to heading 

sudo fdisk -l
sudo blkid

find your disk name, then find the UUID

item.title: how to add a table of content to hugo
item.description:
Here I use the official way.

Enable official TOC Link to heading

In the hugo.toml, add blow:

[markup]
 [markup.tableOfContents]
 endLevel = 4
 ordered = true
 startLevel = 2

Set up in the html Link to heading

In the theme/<your-theme>/layouts/posts/single.html, in the content, add blow:

<div class="toc-container" >
{{ .TableOfContents }}
</div>

example in hugo-coder Link to heading 

<div class="post-content">
{{ if .Params.featuredImage }}
 <img src="{{ .Params.featuredImage | relURL }}" alt="Featured image"/>
{{ end }}

 <!-- TOC -->
 <div class="toc-container" >
 {{ .TableOfContents }}
 </div>
 <!-- TOC -->

{{ .Content }}
</div>

item.title: Org Grammar
item.description:
check out the manual with M-x org-info

frontmatter Link to heading 

#+title: org mode in doom emacs
#+description: an document to demonstrate org mode.
#+author: zka-win

* head 1
** 2
*** 3

Headline Link to heading

z z: scoll to center SPC m h: create a healine under this current healine SPC m i: create item C-RET: insert the same item. TAB: to flod and unfold. S-TAB: unfold. z c: close z o: open z M: close all z R: open all g j/k: go to the next same level g h/l: go to the next or last level. C-RET: the new level the same as the current level M-h/l: change the level

item.title: daily English words [2025-02-22 Sat]
item.description: a slim volume of verse UK is the abbreviation of the United Kingdom. everyone have to abide by the law I really appreciate his complete absorption in his work. The proposal boarders on the absurd. His words are in accord with his ideas. We should first try to acquaint ourselves with the facts. We should adhere our opinions. He had no warrant forhis suspicion. His house is adjacent to mine. We heard laughter in the adjoining room. He is responsible for the administration of justice. We can advertise on the Internet. He showed me some aerial photographs. I affirm that what he said is true. Her blush witnessed her agitation. We spent a most agreeable day together. Alas! The church should have no political alignment. The approaching Allied forces.

item.title: snippets
item.description:
In the doom emacs the defaut directory is ~/.doom.d/snippets/ . And in the the file should be divided into different derctory to triger different file in the corresponding mode.

front-matter Link to heading 

# -*- mode: snippet -*-
# name: the name to search
# key: the key word to be completed by <tab>
# condition: if here is nil, the snippet will not be trigger
# --

variables Link to heading

main Link to heading 

${1:default_value}
${2:label}
${2:same}
;; 插入 snippets 后可以使用 <tab> 按顺序跳转。
;; 里面的默认值可以用作提示
;; 还可以插入相同的值
${0}
;; 这个是最后的光标位置
${cursor}
;; 使用后会自动跳转，也就意味着不能够修改其他的${数字}

advance Link to heading 

${CILPBOARD}
;; 从当前的剪切版中获取信息
${SECLRCTION}
;; 从当前选择的内容中获取信息
;; 但是似乎难以决定输入的位置
;; 不如使用 ${CILPBOARD}

Other Link to heading

  • $date: 日期
  • $time: 时间
  • $file: filename
  • $filepath
  • `(format-time-string "%Y-%m-%d")`: 用于设定时间

可以利用``来调用 elisp

item.title: summary
item.description:
Introduction Link to heading

please ignore the ‘,’ at the beggining.

#+TITLE: No matter uppercase or not
#+AUTHOR: me

Heading Link to heading 

* the first heading
** second
*** third
** TODO every heading can be a TODO

Annotation Link to heading

bold italic underline delete code code

List Link to heading 

itemize
- item1
+ item2
  • item
  • item
enumerate
1. item-1
2) item-2
A. item-A
B) item-B
  1. first
  2. second
  3. aa
  4. bb
- [ ] not started
- [-] in process
- [X] finished
  • not started
  • [-] in process
  • finished

Links Link to heading 

[[https://google.com][name]]
[[picture path]]

google

item.title: Difference of the format in the org-mind-map
item.description:
Raster Link to heading

GIF(Graphics Interchange Format) Link to heading

  • low quality
  • support animation and transparent

PNG(Portable Network Graphics) Link to heading

  • high quality
  • support transparent
  • suitable for web
  • not ideal for print

JPEG(Joint Photographic Experts Group) Link to heading

  • lossy compression
  • multiple colors, ideal for photographs
  • good for web

TIFF(Tagged Image File Format) Link to heading

  • best quality
  • support layers, transparency.
  • for professional photography or print
  • too large

Vector Link to heading

EPS(Encapsulated PostScript) Link to heading

  • common used in printing and design
  • scalable without losing quality
  • being replaced

SVG(Scalable Vector Graphics) Link to heading

  • the same as EPS
  • editable with code
  • support animation and interactivity

PDF(Portable Document Format) Link to heading

don’t need introductions

item.title: how to use the ox-hugo
item.description:
add blow at first

#+hugo_base_dir: ~/blog
#+hugo_section: /posts/
#+hugo_weight: auto
#+hugo_auto_set_lastmod: t

add blow in every article you want to public.

:PROPERTIES:
:EXPORT_FILE_NAME: this is the file name
:EXPORT_DATE: 2025-02-13
:END:

[//]

item.title: Theorem
item.description:
1. 数组的下标都是从零开始
  2. 内存空间地址连续
#include <iostream>
using namespace std;
void test_arr(){
 int array[2][3] = {
 {0, 1, 2},
 {3, 4, 5}
 };

 cout << &array[0][0] << " " << &array[0][1] << " " << &array[0][2] << endl;
 cout << &array[1][0] << " " << &array[1][1] << " " << &array[1][2] << endl;
}

int main(){
 test_arr();
 return 0;
}

输出的地址

0x7ffea7a6d920 0x7ffea7a6d924 0x7ffea7a6d928
0x7ffea7a6d92c 0x7ffea7a6d930 0x7ffea7a6d934

首先储存的是 int 类型的数据，所以是4个字节，显然连续。

[//]

item.title: Binary Search
item.description:
利用左右区间书写。 给定一个 n 个元素有序的（升序）整型数组 nums 和一个目标值 target ，写一个函数搜索 nums 中的 target，如果目标值存在返回下标，否则返回 -1。

int search(int* nums, int numsSize, int target) {
 int left = 0;
 int right = numsSize - 1;
 int middle = 0;
 while (left <= right) {
 middle = (left + right)/2;
 if (nums[middle] > target) {
 right = middle - 1;
 } else if ( nums[middle] < target ) {
 left = middle + 1;
 } else if ( nums[middle] == target ) {
 return middle;
 }
 }
 return -1;
}

[//]

item.title: Remove Elements
item.description:
Problem Link to heading

给你一个数组 nums 和一个值 val，你需要原地移除所有数值等于 val 的元素，并返回移除后数组的新长度。 不要使用额外的数组空间，你必须仅使用 O(1) 额外空间并原地修改输入数组。 元素的顺序可以改变。你不需要考虑数组中超出新长度后面的元素。 示例 1: 给定 nums = [3,2,2,3], val = 3, 函数应该返回新的长度 2, 并且 nums 中的前两个元素均为 2。 你不需要考虑数组中超出新长度后面的元素。 示例 2: 给定 nums = [0,1,2,2,3,0,4,2], val = 2, 函数应该返回新的长度 5, 并且 nums 中的前五个元素为 0, 1, 3, 0, 4。

Theorem Link to heading

由于数组是一个连续的地址空间，所以我们是无法真正删除数组的元素的，我们只能够把数组后一位往前移动，覆盖前一位元素。 earse() 就是使用的这样的方法，复杂度是 O(n^2)

class Solution {
public:
 int removeElement(vector<int>& nums, int val) {
 int size = nums.size();
 for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
 if (nums[i] == val) { // 发现需要移除的元素，就将数组集体向前移动一位
 for (int j = i + 1; j < size; j++) {
 nums[j - 1] = nums[j];
 }
 i--; // 因为下标i以后的数值都向前移动了一位，所以i也向前移动一位
 size--; // 此时数组的大小-1
 }
 }
 return size;

 }
};

双指针 Link to heading

利用两个不同的索引，一个指向需要被覆盖的位置，一个指向需要覆盖的位置。

item.title: Square of Ordered array
item.description:
Problems Link to heading

Given an integer array nums sorted in non-decreasing order, return a new array consisting of the squares of each number, also sorted in non-decreasing order.

Example Link to heading

  • Input: ~nums = [-4,-1,0,3,10]~
  • Output: [0,1,9,16,100]

Two-pointer Method Link to heading

Actually, the biggest number must in the left or the right. #+begin_src c int* sortedSquares(int* nums, int numsSize, int* returnSize){ //返回的数组大小就是原数组大小 *returnSize = numsSize; //创建两个指针，right指向数组最后一位元素，left指向数组第一位元素 int right = numsSize - 1; int left = 0;

item.title: Subarray with minimum length
item.description:
Problems Link to heading

给定一个含有 n 个正整数的数组和一个正整数 s ，找出该数组中满足其和 ≥ s 的长度最小的连续子数组，并返回其长度。如果不存在符合条件的子数组，返回 0。

Double pointer Link to heading

my version Link to heading 

int minSubArrayLen(int target, int* nums, int numsSize){
 int left=0;
 int right =0;
 int sum = 0;
 int* tar;
 int len = numsSize;
 int* n;
 int i = 0;
 for(right=0; right < numsSize; right++) {
 for(i=0; i<= right; i++){
 sum = sum+ nums[i];
 }
 if (sum>=target) {
 if ( (right-left+1) < len ) {
 len = right-left+1;
 for( i = left; i<=right; i++ ) {
 n[i-left] = nums[i];
 }
 }
 left++;
 }
 }
 printf("%a %d", *n, len);
 return 0;
}

reference Link to heading 

int minSubArrayLen(int target, int* nums, int numsSize){
 //初始化最小长度为INT_MAX
 int minLength = INT_MAX;
 int sum = 0;

 int left = 0, right = 0;
 //右边界向右扩展
 for(; right < numsSize; ++right) {
 sum += nums[right];
 //当sum的值大于等于target时，保存长度，并且收缩左边界
 while(sum >= target) {
 int subLength = right - left + 1;
 minLength = minLength < subLength ? minLength : subLength;
 sum -= nums[left++];
 }
 }
 //若minLength不为INT_MAX，则返回minLnegth
 return minLength == INT_MAX ? 0 : minLength;
}

在直接加减数组数字，而不是先找数组

item.title: Install rime on Ubuntu 24.04
item.description:
SCHEDULED: <2025-03-08 Sat 23:00>

Install Link to heading 

sudo apt-get install ibus-rime

Set up Link to heading

Language Support Link to heading

In the Ubuntu, search for language support, then click Install/Remove Languages, add Chinese.

Input Source Link to heading

In the Ubuntu, search for Settings, click Keyboard tab, then Add Input Source, Chinese, Chinese(Rime).

item.title: Fix hp 1020 printer didn't work in the Ubuntu 24.04
item.description:
Problem Link to heading

As for me, the ubuntu could recognize the hp 1020, but no matter how much times I send tasks to the printer, it never run actually.

Solution Link to heading 

sudo hp-plgin

Follow the hints.

Some errors Link to heading

Here I encountered some problems.

Downloading firmware to device hp:/usb/HP_LaserJet_1020?serial=JL3AW5S...
Traceback (most recent call last):
 File "/usr/bin/hp-plugin", line 409, in <module>
 if d.downloadFirmware():
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 File "/usr/share/hplip/base/device.py", line 2672, in downloadFirmware
 log.debug("%s bytes downloaded." % utils.commafy(bytes_written))
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
 File "/usr/share/hplip/base/utils.py", line 476, in commafy
 return locale.format("%s", val, grouping=True)
 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: module 'locale' has no attribute 'format'. Did you mean: '_format'?
 ~ 25s base py

I do following. edit /usr/share/hplip/base/utils.py, found commafy function:

item.title: create shortcut of application in the Ubuntu
item.description:
Location Link to heading

  • Global: /usr/share/applications
  • Personal: ~/.local/share/applications

Format Link to heading 

[Desktop Entry]
Type=Application
Name=Name of application
Exec=the path of exec
Icon=path fo icon
Categories=
Terminal=false

item.title: daily words [2025-02-23 Sun]
item.description: trying to mask her agitation An amateur shouldn’t play roulette for high stakes. He was appointed ambassador to the United States. ambient sounds of children in the background. He gave us an ambiguous answer. He is an ambitious businessman. Sound waves are measured by their amplitude. It is not always reliable to argue by analogy. anode is the positive electrode The Antarctic is the area around the South Pole. Extended the radio antenna. The comparison is apt. We can’t stand this arctic weather. It is easier to descend than to ascend. I ascertain that he was murdered. He asctibes his success to good luck.
